subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards the Self-Sufficient, the Most Exalted, that he may inhale the fragrance of the utterance of his Lord, the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی اقبل الی الغنی المتعال لیجد عرف بیان ربه الرحمن من
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
